question: Count the number of different customers who have bought a Monitor Product.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Orders.customer_id) FROM Customer_Orders JOIN Order_Items ON Customer_Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id WHERE Products.product_name = 'Monitor Product';

back_translation.intent: 统计满足特定产品类型的唯一客户数量

semantic.reason: 缺少COUNT(DISTINCT)关键字，可能导致重复客户被计数。原始问题明确要求统计不同客户数量，而反向翻译描述中仅使用COUNT聚合函数
